Container.Name: media-mcp
Container.Overview: Optional internal MCP sidecar for Sonarr, Radarr, Plex, Bazarr, Prowlarr, qBittorrent, NZBGet, and Seerr-family media automation. This container should not publish its MCP port to the LAN.
Container.Requires: Create the Docker network first: docker network create codex-mgmt. Do not add a host port mapping for 6971 unless you intentionally expose MCP.

Config.Name: Media MCP Bearer Token
Config.Description: Bearer token clients must use to call this MCP server. Must match codex-terminal if media MCP is enabled there.

Config.Name: MCP Host
Config.Description: Bind inside the container/network only. Do not publish the port to the host.

Config.Name: MCP Port
Config.Description: Internal MCP port on codex-mgmt.

Config.Name: Request Timeout Ms
Config.Description: Maximum time for one upstream media API call.

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Sonarr base URL. Leave blank to disable Sonarr tools.

Config.Name: Sonarr API Key
Config.Description: Sonarr Settings > General API key. Required when Sonarr URL is set.

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Radarr base URL. Leave blank to disable Radarr tools.

Config.Name: Radarr API Key
Config.Description: Radarr Settings > General API key. Required when Radarr URL is set.

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Plex base URL. Leave blank to disable Plex tools.

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Plex token. Required when Plex URL is set.

Config.Name: Tautulli URL
Config.Description: Tautulli base URL. Leave blank to disable Tautulli diagnostics.

Config.Name: Tautulli API Key
Config.Description: Tautulli API key. Required when Tautulli URL is set.

Config.Name: Bazarr URL
Config.Description: Bazarr base URL. Leave blank to disable Bazarr tools.

Config.Name: Bazarr API Key
Config.Description: Bazarr API key. Required when Bazarr URL is set.

Config.Name: Prowlarr URL
Config.Description: Prowlarr base URL. Leave blank to disable Prowlarr tools.

Config.Name: Prowlarr API Key
Config.Description: Prowlarr Settings > General API key. Required when Prowlarr URL is set.

Config.Name: qBittorrent URL
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI base URL. Leave blank to disable qBittorrent tools.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Username
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI username. Required when qBittorrent URL is set.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Password
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI password. Required when qBittorrent URL is set.

Config.Name: NZBGet URL
Config.Description: NZBGet base URL. Leave blank to disable NZBGet tools.

Config.Name: NZBGet Username
Config.Description: NZBGet username. Required when NZBGet URL is set.

Config.Name: NZBGet Password
Config.Description: NZBGet password. Required when NZBGet URL is set.

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: Seerr, Overseerr, or Jellyseerr base URL. Leave blank to disable Seerr-family request tools.

Config.Name: Seerr API Key
Config.Description: Seerr, Overseerr, or Jellyseerr API key. Required when Seerr URL is set.
